benchmark: e2e-reviewer vs lint vs AI PR reviewers
limitations: AI reviewer measured by inline spec comments only (capped 6/PR; bots review whole PR with split attention)
judge and reviewer share a model family (possible bias toward ours)
ground truth set by an LLM judge over one 100-PR snapshot, not a human panel
